title: Zoro and Sanji Press Forward
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Hody Jones, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is zoro and sanji press forward.
scene: The scene follows zoro and sanji press forward, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Hody Jones, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Near GYoncord Plaza

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nghhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Around GYoncord Plaza

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy is a pirate and a human, but he's on our side!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even Princess Shirahoshii cried out to him for help ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's come to save the island with boss jimbe!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Straw Hat!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hahahah... the boy seems to have become rather popular in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't get too cocky just because the King is free for the moment!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: you filthy...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: The mermaid Princess is as beautiful as all the rumours say! YoHo hoho!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-san! I saved all these idiots from the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Say, would you be so kind as to show me your -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Do you love me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Slap!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes, yes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, shut up. We made it to the exit by ourselves.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Human Pirates!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could never have escaped without my help!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What exactly was that whale just now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We found him on our way here, so we got him to pull the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have two new awesome weapons!! Who wants to give 'em a test run?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you say New Weapons ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They totally ignored you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I said it quietly on purpose so that they could not hear!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's pretty dangerous for cry-hoshi to be here ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her getting captured was not part of the plan... I'm not sure how we're going to get her out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here you go - the letter you wanted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thank you so much, everyone ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...this is the hope of fish-man island that my mother left for us all....!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: ...but, Luffy-sama... what did you just call me...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I thought you always called me "Crybaby"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, well... I don't really get it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It sounds like you're not much of a baby after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: quite right. Shirahoshii... it must have been difficult for you. .

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All those years ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must apologise ... this all happened because of my decision to conceal the truth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: think Naught of it. You should be proud!!

dialogue.speaker: Hody Jones
dialogue.text: to resist the passing on of hatred is a most noble act!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can only pray that the seed you have planted will grow to cover the entire island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: for if the day should come when all can think the same way as you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I daresay all barriers and conflicts between fish-man and human will fall away with the greatest of ease.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not mean to deny the years you spent shouldering this truth alone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I . must ask that this time, you allow us to lend you our help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...in protecting this seed of hope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Take 'em out, straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thank you so much, everyone...! WaaaAahhh HH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She may not be a baby, but she sure does cry a lot.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a useless ally you were, wander decken ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Captain Hody ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is imperative that Shira- Hoshi be eliminated without delay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It seems you have played me for a fool, jimbel....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should I have known that you would never allow yourself to be captured to easily.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: And you seem very friendly with those humans ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's men like you that I hate most of all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You grew up in the fish-man district, together with Fisher Tiger and a along...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Both of whom met their end at the hands of humans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Yet instead of averaging them, you ally yourself with the very humans responsible ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just as bad as that brain- less Neptune!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I'm King of this Island, I'll change everything!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The upcoming reverie sounds like the perfect opportunity.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll go to MarieJoa and slaughter all the human kings of the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that will teach them to fear our Undersea kingdom!!!

summary: Zoro and Sanji Press Forward. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
